itemListElement.reviewBody:
I wish not to speak but please do not get a admission in this school,1 there are no privacy in boys washroom all the privacy marbles are broken,all the teacher are rude and something they also give abusive words-pt sir and Vidya pawar
And the road Is also not accessible to the cars and moped, please do not put your children in this dirty school

itemReviewed.name: Sinhgad City School - Tilekar Nagar,Kondhwa Budruk

itemListElement.reviewBody:
This school from being a good school becoming the worst school. 1st due to their issue with government the road got dugged up last year. Student faced issue whole year. Now the school principle is creating issues every now and then with parents and students. My 2 kids is in class 5th, and school is forcing for adhar card. Since new enrollment is closed from March 2023 might be closed till august 2023. When we informed the teacher she is so rude in her response.
I want to inform the school be kind with parents and students. Being so rude and rough won't make any sense. We are paying fees due to which you are paid ur salary. So we are the consumer and customer. You misbehave with customers it won't take much time for ur school to eat the dust.
Also to principle I know u are at a powerful position but that doesn't mean you treat the parents disrespectfully.
To class teacher of 5th standard you can't misbehave with small kids, they can't do anything but God is watching... Be humble

itemReviewed.name: Sinhgad City School - Tilekar Nagar,Kondhwa Budruk

itemListElement.reviewBody:
☀24 January 2023
Teachers/Sir ,Maushi/Kaka's all are really good and friendly. 😇Teaching is really good and understandable🌹🌼 . Just should improve the washrooms of both girls and boys and activities should be conducted Discipline should be maintained. Otherwise it's a really fantastic school . I have spent my 10 Beautiful years here and enjoyed each and every day  💞💕. I'll really miss those days in this school I can tell you that you'll surely make some good memories here😍😍💖♥
Thankyou👑

itemReviewed.name: Sinhgad City School - Tilekar Nagar,Kondhwa Budruk

itemListElement.reviewBody:
I just wish there is negative markings here. This is the worst school I   have ever  associated with.
From day 1 i have been regretting my decision. There has been no orientation for new parents .
There is  no communication channel , no almanac in an era where communication has reach skies , they don't even give email ids  and for every little thing they want parents to visit school. In time where loans are given online , this school is still in its 80s .
If yout children have less interest in studies  then the teachers will make sure that the student will hate studies and will beg you that don't send them to school. This school has become a nightmare for my kids. The teachers  will keep on harassing kids more for haircut than paying attention to whether  the student  has noted the important information given by them.  For me it's like sending them to a jail.
When the exams are near they'll cut everything and give it for rewriting to a child who is already below average.. the teachers use harsh words, throw chalks and hands are also used  which comes under corporal punishment. While correcting the notebooks , the teachers will not make corrections but circle it and leave it. Moreover they have problem with parent making the corrections.  We will also not do nor you should do . Neither  they encourage students to improve nor they   co-operate with you in any way . During the computer classe, the  students sit  on the floor and have not used  computers since the school reopened .
They want us to close our eyes  and just pay the fees.
It seems that the school has bunch of frustrated people who do not understand psychology  nor use effective pedogogies.  There is no innovation no activity no encouragement.
You can't think of changing school as they know themselves so well that they ask parents to pay the full year fees  as one installment in the beginning of the year.
Think twice  even before thinking of admission of your kid in this school.

itemReviewed.name: Sinhgad City School - Tilekar Nagar,Kondhwa Budruk

itemListElement.reviewBody:
I wish there was a negative rating. I am compelled to rate 1 star.
It is one of the schools that's is worst than any under previledged government school. I deeply regret choosing that school for my kids. They loved going to school but now they dread the word school. Most teachers come from local country-side background who do not know the speak basic English or to talk to students. Teachers use abusive language with students & threaten students with corporal punishment.
A BIG mistake choosing this school.
